title: carpinus glandulosopunctata
intro: Carpinus glandulosopunctata, also known as the glandular- dotted hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The bark of this plant is used in traditional medicine, containing triterpenoid saponins with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties. The medicinal properties of Carpinus glandulosopunctata are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the bark are typically made into decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
